summary: Strong code quality, sound design. Primary issue: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to full 40-char SHA (lines 39–40)—GitHub Actions best practice requires full commit pinning. Missing labels.json and .actrc files from deliverable despite being referenced in workflow. Glob-to-regex impl. thorough with good edge-case handling. Excellent error handling (Set-StrictMode, $ErrorActionPreference, meaningful messages). Test harness is sophisticated—6 cases via act with structure validation & output parsing. Proper least-privilege permissions. Code is production-ready with action pinning fix.
